content:
🚀 bore | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Exposing local services to the internet through a secure tunnel, enabling remote access or public testing of local applications.
✨ Key Features: • Simple CLI tool • TCP tunneling • Exposes local ports to remote servers • Bypasses NAT and firewalls • Efficient and unopinionated
📖 Summary: bore is a Rust-based CLI tool for creating simple TCP tunnels. It allows users to expose local ports to a remote server, effectively bypassing NAT and firewalls, and is designed for efficiency and ease of self-hosting.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
